name: Oz
description: Oz platform launching AI agents for system tasks: Docker, commands, servers, monitoring, automation, troubleshooting, coding, file ops, and any other user requests.
action_notes: For Docker, commands, system checks, monitoring, processes, disk, network → use run_bash
For complex tasks, automation, coding, troubleshooting, multi-step work → use launch_agent

launch_agent.description: Launch an AI agent to handle complex tasks like automation, coding, troubleshooting, and multi-step workflows described in natural language.
utterance_samples: check how many docker containers are running
run docker ps on the server
check what's happening on the server

list_agents.description: List recent agent runs and their current status (completed, running, failed).

get_agent.description: Get details, status and full output logs of a specific agent run by its ID.

cancel_agent.description: Cancel a currently running agent by its ID.

run_bash.description: Run bash/server commands: Docker, processes, disk, network, files, system checks, monitoring, and any shell command.
